profile_summary: Group traveler (mid budget) prioritizing value for money, nightlife, central location.

recommendations.justification: The Park Continental, Lima ranks #1 for this traveler on value for money (+0.72), nightlife (+0.80), central location (+0.92), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The rooftop bar was packed and fun, and the nightlife nearby was excellent."

supporting_evidence.quote: The rooftop bar was packed and fun, and the nightlife nearby was excellent.
Excellent value for the price — far better than I expected for the rate.
Great bars and clubs right around the corner, perfect for a night out.

recommendations.justification: The Boulevard Orchid, Paris ranks #2 for this traveler on value for money (+0.68), nightlife (+0.74), central location (+0.92), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Excellent value for the price — far better than I expected for the rate."

supporting_evidence.quote: Excellent value for the price — far better than I expected for the rate.
Great bang for your buck; you really get a lot for what you pay.
Great base for experiencing the real culture — artisans and street food all around.
